enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Nikkal Nikkal Kelambuda conveys a lively and energetic vibe, celebrating the spirit of fun and enjoyment.

How does this song fit into the movie plot?

In Kaala, this song reflects the vibrant culture and the lively atmosphere of the characters' environment.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Dopeadelicz and composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was the song released?

Nikkal Nikkal Kelambuda was released on May 7, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nikkal Nikkal Kelambuda, the energetic beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song is a perfect fit for the vibrant scenes in Kaala, showcasing the lively spirit of the characters. It evokes feelings of excitement and encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. Overall, this track stands out as a highlight in the film's soundtrack, making it a favorite for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nikkal Nikkal Kelambuda from Kaala is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the vibrant spirit of the film. With the unique collaboration of Dopeadelicz and Santhosh Narayanan, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the pulsating beats and catchy lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: This is our fort, if you come inside, it will be a hunt, just hit one and it will echo in the town.
Even the small ones can make a big impact, when our people come, the route changes.
Stay awake, stay awake, stay alert, stay awake.
Stay awake, stay alert.
Hey, keep shouting, keep shouting, keep shouting, it has gone away, keep shouting.
Look, we are not slaves, we have understood and risen, we are always brave.
The truth is changing, the earth is playing tricks, our trust has been broken, we are losing our way.
With the wealth we have, we are not showing our faces, don’t talk nonsense.
Our uniqueness cannot be taken away, you know.
Your dreams cannot be fulfilled here, keep shouting, keep shouting, keep shouting.
Stay awake, stay awake, stay alert, stay awake.
Stay alert, stay awake.
Hey, keep shouting, keep shouting, it has gone away, keep shouting.
Shouting - don’t keep it here, your beauty is too much, let it go.
Just tie it up and take it away, don’t let it hang around.
This is our time, don’t forget that this body is yours.
If you give it back, it won’t hold, look for the way and keep shouting.
Keep shouting, it has gone away, keep shouting.
Keep shouting, it has gone away, keep shouting.
Stay awake, stay awake, keep shouting, stay awake, keep shouting.
